entity.label: Beth-diblathaim
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: House of two cakes of figs, a city of Moab, upon which Jeremiah (48:22) denounced destruction. It is called also Almon-diblathaim (Num. 33:46) and Diblath (Ezek. 6:14). (R.V., “Diblah.”)

nodes.label: Beth-diblathaim
nodes.description: House of two cakes of figs, a city of Moab, upon which Jeremiah (48:22) denounced destruction. It is called also Almon-diblathaim (Num. 33:46) and Diblath (Ezek. 6:14). (R.V., “Diblah.”)

verses.text: And upon Dibon, and upon Nebo, and upon Bethdiblathaim,
